data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the delivery confirmation process, which includes capturing a customer signature and a photo of the delivered item. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of these functionalities. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to the signature.
No evidence of capturing timestamps and GPS coordinates with signatures.
